aiReadyLines.text: Lesson 8 Grocery Shopping
usc word stress and stress on words in sentences
and answer questions
© participate in short dialogues and conversations on familiar topics
read and understand texts
. Some guests will visit Imran's house tonight. So Imran's mother
will cook dinner for them. She asks Imran to go to the local market.
He often forgets to buy the necessary items. So his mother is making
a shopping list for him. He is helping his mother make the list.
Read the conversation between the mother and son.
Maa, what do I need to buy?
Well, see if we have enough
We have some potatoes but I don't
think it's enough.
Then get half kg. of potatoes. How
about tomatoes?
Idon't see any tomatoes.
Are there any other vegetables?
Yes, there are some beans, carrots,
cucumber and all.
Well, T'll need one kg. of tomatoes. Half kg. of beans and two
cauliflowers.... Are there any eggs, dear?

Lesson 8 Grocery Shopping
After completing the lesson students will be able to
usc word stress and stress on words in sentences
and answer questions
© participate in short dialogues and conversations on familiar topics
read and understand texts
. Some guests will visit Imran's house tonight. So Imran's mother
will cook dinner for them. She asks Imran to go to the local market.
He often forgets to buy the necessary items. So his mother is making
a shopping list for him. He is helping his mother make the list.
Read the conversation between the mother and son.
Maa, what do I need to buy?
Well, see if we have enough
potatoes?
We have some potatoes but I don't
think it's enough.
Then get half kg. of potatoes. How
about tomatoes?
Idon't see any tomatoes.
Are there any other vegetables?
Yes, there are some beans, carrots,
cucumber and all.
Well, T'll need one kg. of tomatoes. Half kg. of beans and two
cauliflowers.... Are there any eggs, dear?
